---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Work in Progress
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2026).
<em>Corn ethanol for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) in the United States: market and welfare effects</em>.<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2026).
<em>How much does it cost to reduce emissions in Nebraska? Evidence from corn and soybean production</em>.<br>

Rocha Junior, A. B.; Almeida, F. M. de S. (2026).
<em>More land, less productivity? The relationship between deforestation and agriculture in Brazil</em>.<br>

Lobo, G. D.; Rocha Junior, A. B.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Danelon, A. F.; Almeida, A. N. (2026).
<em>Unsafe techniques and agrochemical poisoning: evidence from Brazil</em>.<br>

Lobo, G. D.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Rocha Junior, A. B.; Danelon, A. F.; Almeida, A. N. (2026).
<em>Agrochemical poisoning and suicide attempts in rural Brazil: a spatial econometric approach</em>.

</p>

<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->

<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Papers Under Review
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.9;">

Castro, N. R.; Fachinelli, A. L.; Almeida, F. M. de S.; Silva, A. F. (2026).
<em>Agribusiness in São Paulo: characterization and GDP performance (2010–2023)</em>.
<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S.; Perrin, R.; Fulginiti, L.; Dennis, E. (2026).
<em>The carbon intensity (CI) of co-products fed to beef cattle in the Northern Plains</em>.

</p>
<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->
<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Peer-Reviewed Articles
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Perrin, R., Almeida, F. M. de S., Fulginiti, L., & Dennis, E. (2026).
Expected carbon intensity (CI) for Northern Plains corn and soybean.
<em>Crop, Forage &amp; Turfgrass Management</em>. Forthcoming.<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., & Spolador, H. F. S. (2024).
Determinants of corn total factor productivity in Brazil: A stochastic frontier analysis for the period from 1995 to 2017.
<em>Revista de Economia e Sociologia Rural</em>, 62, e287305.
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1590/1806-9479.2023.287305">https://doi.org/10.1590/1806-9479.2023.287305</a><br>

Abdoulaye, A. M., Almeida, F. M. de S., Ervilha, G. T., & Lima, J. E. (2022).
Eficiência técnica das instituições de microfinanças na região da União Econômica e Monetária do Oeste Africano (UEMOA).
<em>Africana Studia</em>, 38, 21–37.
<a href="http://dx.doi.org/10.21747/0874-2375/afr38a">http://dx.doi.org/10.21747/0874-2375/afr38a</a><br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Gomes, A. P., & de Freitas, A. F. (2021).
Social networks and efficiency in dairy farming: The case of the program for the development of dairy farming in Minas Gerais, Brazil.
<em>Livestock Science</em>, 244, 104401.
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.livsci.2021.104401">https://doi.org/10.1016/j.livsci.2021.104401</a><br>

Simões, A. R. P., Bueno, N. P., Almeida, F. M. de S., Nicholson, C. F., Reis, J. D. D., & Leonel, F. D. P. (2020).
Public policies for enhancing diffusion of technology: A network analysis for a dairy farmer community in Minas Gerais, Brazil.
<em>Revista Brasileira de Zootecnia</em>, 49, e20190207.
<a href="https://doi.org/10.37496/rbz4920190207">https://doi.org/10.37496/rbz4920190207</a><br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., & Rodrigues, C. T. (2019).
Evaluation of the quota policy at the Federal University of Viçosa.
<em>Planejamento e Políticas Públicas</em>, 53.
<a href="https://www.ipea.gov.br/ppp/index.php/PPP/article/view/868/530">https://www.ipea.gov.br/ppp/index.php/PPP/article/view/868/530</a><br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Cassuce, F. C. D. C., & Cirino, J. F. (2016).
Academic performance at Universidade Federal de Viçosa.
<em>Revista de Ciências Humanas</em>, 16(1), 155–175.
<a href="https://locus.ufv.br/server/api/core/bitstreams/3438fa4b-4085-4b6e-82ba-d3680f4835d6/content">https://locus.ufv.br/server/api/core/bitstreams/3438fa4b-4085-4b6e-82ba-d3680f4835d6/content</a>

</p>
<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->
<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Book Chapters
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Barros, G. S. de C., Castro, N. R., & Almeida, F. M. de S. (2020).
Direções do crescimento na agricultura.
In J. E. R. Vieira Filho & J. G. Gasques (Eds.),
<em>Uma jornada pelos contrastes do Brasil: Cem anos do censo agropecuário</em> (pp. 51–66).
Ipea.
<a href="https://doi.org/10.38116/978-65-5635-011-0/cap3">
https://doi.org/10.38116/978-65-5635-011-0/cap3
</a>

</p>
<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->
<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Extension, Outreach, and Technical Reports
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Almeida, F. M. de S., Perrin, R. K., Fulginiti, L. E., & Dennis, E. (2025).
<em>Carbon intensity of co-products fed to beef cattle in Nebraska</em>.
Cornhusker Economics, University of Nebraska–Lincoln.
<a href="https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-co-products-fed-beef-cattle-nebraska/">
https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-co-products-fed-beef-cattle-nebraska/
</a><br>

Perrin, R. K., Almeida, F. M. de S., Fulginiti, L. E., & Dennis, E. (2025).
<em>Expected carbon intensity of Nebraska corn and soybeans</em>.
Cornhusker Economics, University of Nebraska–Lincoln.
<a href="https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-nebraska-corn-and-soybeans/">
https://agecon.unl.edu/expected-carbon-intensity-ci-nebraska-corn-and-soybeans/
</a><br>

Perrin, R. K., Fulginiti, L. E., & Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024).
<em>Will SAF turbocharge the corn ethanol market?</em>.
Cornhusker Economics, University of Nebraska–Lincoln.
<a href="https://digitalcommons.unl.edu/agecon_cornhusker/1244/">
https://digitalcommons.unl.edu/agecon_cornhusker/1244/
</a>

</p>

<p style="margin-top:0.8rem; margin-bottom:0; line-height:1.8;">

Quarterly technical reports on Brazilian agribusiness:

</p>

<ul style="margin:0.3rem 0 0.6rem 1.2rem; line-height:1.8;">

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/pib-do-agronegocio-brasileiro.aspx">
      GDP
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/mercado-de-trabalho-do-agronegocio.aspx">
      Labor market
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <a href="https://www.cepea.org.br/br/analises-ippa.aspx">
      Producer price index
    </a>
  </li>

</ul>
<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->
<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Selected Paper and Poster Presentations
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Almeida, F. M. de S., Perrin, R., & Fulginiti, L. (2026).
Eco-efficiency and economic–environmental trade-offs in corn and soybean production in Nebraska.
Paper accepted for presentation at the <em>2026 AAEA Annual Meeting</em> (Kansas City, Missouri, July 26–28, 2026).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Perrin, R., & Fulginiti, L. (2026).
Corn ethanol for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) in the United States: Market and welfare effects.
Paper accepted for presentation at the <em>2026 AAEA Annual Meeting</em> (Kansas City, Missouri, July 26–28, 2026).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., Perrin, R., & Fulginiti, L. (2026).
Economic and environmental trade-offs in Nebraska corn and soybean production.
Paper accepted for presentation at the <em>2026 WAEA Annual Meeting</em> (Flagstaff, Arizona, June 21–23, 2026).<br>

Perrin, R., Almeida, F. M. de S., Fulginiti, L., & Dennis, E. (2025).
Carbon intensity of Midwest feedstuffs: Corn and soybeans.
Presented at the <em>Midwest Extension Farm Management and Outlook Conference</em> (Omaha, Nebraska, August 14–15, 2025).<br>

Perrin, R., Almeida, F. M. de S., Fulginiti, L., & Dennis, E. (2025).
Carbon intensity of Midwest feedstuffs.
Presented at the <em>2025 AAEA &amp; WAEA Joint Annual Meeting</em> (Denver, Colorado, July 27–29, 2025).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S., & Spolador, H. F. S. (2025).
Total factor productivity in Brazilian agriculture and conservation practices: A regional study of corn production.
Presented at the <em>North American Productivity Workshop</em> (Arlington, Virginia, June 9–12, 2025).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024).
Unlocking agricultural potential: An opportunity cost analysis in Brazil.
Presented at the <em>2024 AAEA Annual Meeting</em> (New Orleans, Louisiana, July 28–30, 2024).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024).
Impact of agricultural practices on Brazilian agriculture productivity evolution.
Presented at the <em>2024 AAEA Annual Meeting</em> (New Orleans, Louisiana, July 28–30, 2024).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024).
Conservation practices and agricultural productivity: Evidence from Brazil.
Presented at the <em>2024 WAEA Annual Meeting</em> (San Francisco, California, June 23–25, 2024).<br>

Almeida, F. M. de S. (2024).
Balancing growth and sustainability: Assessing the opportunity cost in Brazilian agriculture.
Presented at the <em>2024 WAEA Annual Meeting</em> (San Francisco, California, June 23–25, 2024).

</p>
<!-- &&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&-->
<hr style="border:none; border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0; margin:2rem 0;">

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Talks &amp; Webinars
</h2>

<p style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

Dennis, E., Almeida, F. M. de S., & Perrin, R. (March 2026).
What’s the carbon footprint of your feed? New evidence on distillers’ grains and soybean meal.
Invited webinar at the <em>Center for Agricultural Profitability</em>, University of Nebraska–Lincoln.
<a href="https://cap.unl.edu/carbon-footprint-of-feed-webinar/">
https://cap.unl.edu/carbon-footprint-of-feed-webinar/
</a><br>

Dennis, E., Almeida, F. M. de S., & Perrin, R. (February 2026).
Estimating what matters: Carbon intensity in corn and soybean markets.
Invited webinar at the <em>Center for Agricultural Profitability</em>, University of Nebraska–Lincoln.
<a href="https://cap.unl.edu/carbon-intensity-corn-soybeans-webinar-2026/">
https://cap.unl.edu/carbon-intensity-corn-soybeans-webinar-2026/
</a>

</p>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
